creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co writes:

> >Description:
> felt didn't look for Xaw3d in the correct place. patch-ab was wrong,
> so I replaced it with a new patch to support Xaw3d.

felt seems to be fine without Xaw3d. If you absolutely want Xaw3d,
move the old Xaw stuff out of the way and replace it with symlinks to
the Xaw3d headers and library. There are only very few programs in the
ports collection which really need special treatment for Xaw3d (like
print/gv), we normally don't bother about the rest. This leaves the
decision between Xaw, Xaw3d, neXtaw and Xaw95 to the user, where it
belongs, IMHO.

tg
